role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified lack of linguistic evidence (no signs) and stayed silent.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and road shoulders.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed tree species (Betula, Pinus) and forest density.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road markings and shoulder composition.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Analyzed camera artifacts and image quality.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the country (Russia) by leveraging meta-evidence (camera artifacts) to break the botanical and landscape ambiguity shared with Finland and Sweden. The agents stayed within their domains, though the regulatory agent missed the driving-side cue.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described boreal forest and gravel shoulders.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Accurately described markings; missed driving side.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Accurately described lens flare and image quality.
